Notice Of stockholders meeting Of
The Washington Water Power com
pany for the purpose of increasing it's
capital stock and considering a Ger.
tain amendment to the articles of in
corporation and the bylaws Of, the
company. !.
Notice is hereby given that a
stockholders meeting Of The WASH
ington Water Power company IL here
by called and will be held at the Of
Ace Of said company In the Empire
State building. corner of Riverside
avenue and Lincoln street, in the city
and county Of Spokane. state Of
Warrington. at the hour Of 2 p. M,
on the fourth day Of August, 1909,
for the purpose Of Increasing the cap
ital stock Of said company from two
million six hundred thousand dollars
to three million six hundred thousand
dollars, and from twsnty-six thousand
shares Of the par value Of ono hun
dred dollars each to thirty-six thou
sand shares Of the par value Of one
hundred dollars each, ana for the
purpose Of amending the articles Of
incorporation and bylaws Of said
company by increasing the number
Of members Of the board Of trustees
of said company from ten to eleven.
Said meeting II called and this no
tics signed by = majority OF the
trustees Of said company.


Dated at Spokane, Washington, this
sth day of June 1908.
